title: fix: dedupe Stripe checkout webhook credits
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Balancing the books
gist.blurb: Our billing system just got a little smarter! We've taught our database to perfectly organize Stripe receipts, making sure your Pollen credit top-ups are always perfectly balanced.
gist.summary: Implemented idempotency for Stripe checkout webhooks using D1 batching to ensure accurate credit allocation.
gist.impact: Credit top-ups are now more robust and reliable, preventing any accounting hiccups from duplicate network events.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot acting as an accountant, organizing coins or receipts with the monitor robot, representing reliable billing and deduplication.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny accountant visor, carefully organizing glowing golden coins into a neat stack on a wooden desk. A chunky robot with a CRT monitor head holds a long paper receipt, looking helpful. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
